title: gymnogramma calomelanos var. peruviana
intro: Gymnogramma calomelanos var. peruviana is a variety of Gymnogramma calomelanos, a species of fern in the family Pteridaceae, commonly known as the black fern or maidenhair fern. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gymnogramma calomelanos var. peruviana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically prepared by steeping the dried leaves in hot water or a solvent.
